articles.title: Local currency trade with China, Thailand and Indonesia surges to RM82.1bil, says Anwar
articles.summary: PETALING JAYA: Malaysia has significantly increased the use of local currencies in trade with China, Thailand and Indonesia as part of efforts to cut reliance on the US dollar and conventional systems

articles.title: Uni student expelled from UMPSA for desecrating Quran
articles.summary: KUANTAN: A student at Universiti Malaysia Pahang Al-Sultan Abdullah (UMPSA) has been expelled following charges of desecrating the Quran and posting offensive content on social media. Read full story

articles.title: Two injured in Sungai Petani house fire
articles.summary: SUNGAI PETANI: A fire broke out in a home in Kampung Bukit, Sungai Pasir, near here on Tuesday (March 24), leaving two women injured. Read full story

articles.title: Hot weather: Muslims urged to perform prayers for rain
articles.summary: PUTRAJAYA: Muslims have been urged to perform Solat Sunat Istisqa' (prayers for rain) following the ongoing hot and dry weather sweeping across the country. Read full story

articles.title: Global oil price uncertainty may pressure cost of living, warns Fomca chief

articles.title: Melaka residents told to limit outdoor activities due to rising UV levels and heat
articles.summary: MELAKA: Melakans have been urged to limit outdoor activities following a rise in ultraviolet (UV) radiation levels and temperatures that have reached unhealthy levels, says Datuk Ngwe Hee Sem. Read fu

articles.title: Malaysia, Japan committed to strengthening strategic cooperation, says PM

articles.title: Firefighters spend Aidilfitri battling 150-hectare blaze in Kota Tinggi
articles.summary: KOTA TINGGI: Firefighters from the Punggai Fire and Rescue Station are still working to extinguish a 150-hectare bush fire along the Punggai Bypass Highway heading towards Sebana Cove. Read full story
